title: Arthrospira platensis Growth Media Stock Solution Preparation
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"5q9om","text":"The purpose of this protocol is to prepare a growth media for
spirulina (Arthrospira platensis). Arthrospira
platensis is a cyanobacterium species usually found in alkali
environments rich with carbonate and bicarbonate concentrations. Arthrospira
platensis cultures thrive in media with a pH between 9 and 10, with high
bicarbonate concentrations, inorganic salts, and trace Nutrients. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":73,"length":21},{"style":"italic","offset":97,"length":22},{"style":"italic","offset":236,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"8iv4g","text":"Ensure you are working in a sterile aseptic environment ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Arthrospira Growth Media Bulk Salts Alkaline Algae Research Supply Catalog #ASAp-00050
Fill the 500 mL media bottle with 500 mL of Distilled Water Contributed by users
Add the magnetic stir bar to the media bottle and turn on the mixer to medium
Add 7.5 g of Arthrospira Growth Media Bulk Salts Alkaline Algae Research Supply Catalog #ASAp-00050 to the media bottle
Add 1.0 mL of F/2 medium Contributed by users Catalog #MKK50L to the media bottle
Allow the media bottle to stir until all the salts have dissolved (You may need to move the media bottle around so that the stir bar agitates all the settled nutrient salts)
Using a magnet, remove the magnetic stir bar from the media bottle
Place the media bottle in UV sanitizer for 10 minutes uncapped, with cap facing up
First place cap on media bottle, Remove the media bottle from the UV sanitizer
Label media bottle “Spirulina Culture Media” and date
F/2 medium Contributed by users Catalog #MKK50L
creator: Victor vmr Rodriguez
